description: Ingestion manifest for constitutional chatbot RAG pipeline

phases.name: commentary_ru
phases.input_note: Check real filename on VPS with: ls *Metodichka*RUS*

phases.name: commentary_kz
phases.input_note: Check real filename on VPS with: ls *Metodichka*QAZ*

phases.name: faq_kz
phases.input_note: Check real filename on VPS with: ls *QAZ*suraktar*

phases.name: faq_ru
phases.input_note: Check real filename on VPS with: ls *RUS*voprosy*

phases.name: deprecated_kz
phases.input_note: Check real filename on VPS with: ls *1995*kaz*

phases.name: deprecated_ru
phases.input_note: Check real filename on VPS with: ls *1995*rus*

risks.description: Without 'deprecated' status, bot will cite 1995 Constitution as current law
risks.mitigation: Every deprecated chunk has status=deprecated, deprecated_date, deprecation_note

risks.description: PDF filenames on VPS may differ from sanitized names in scripts
risks.mitigation: Run: ls *.pdf *.docx on VPS and update INPUT vars in scripts before running

risks.description: PDF parsing may include page headers/footers as noise
risks.mitigation: Post-extraction QA: spot-check 5 random chunks per file for clean text
After referendum, update effective_date if needed

post_extraction_qa: Verify chunk count per file matches expected
Spot-check 5 random articles per language for text accuracy
Verify no article numbers are missing (sequential check)
Confirm all deprecated chunks have status=deprecated
Check for PDF artifacts in text (page numbers, headers)
